fields.name: New India Assurance Company Limited
fields.description: Offers car insurance under its Motor Policy. Covers natural mishaps such as lightning, rockslide, fire, outpouring, hailstorm, avalanche, tremor, detonation, etc., and other mishaps like robbery, uprising, strike, malevolent activities, accidents caused by external factors, rebellious activities, and damage during delivery by rail, lift, airways, or road. It also includes third-party liability for permanent injury, death, or damage caused to the vehicle.
